name: shiv-furniture-mini-erp
description: Mini ERP for Shiv Furniture Works demand-to-delivery workflows.

scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d db
scripts.check: node --check backend/server.js && node --check backend/routes/router.js && node --check backend/controllers/erpController.js && node --check frontend/scripts/app.js
